positive: Minimalist abstract celestial whale silhouette swimming through nebulae made of glowing cosmic dust and crystalline stars. The whale should be the central, elegant focus. Use a deep indigo and vibrant cyan color palette with touches of ethereal gold for accents. Style should be high-contrast vector illustration with deep space watercolor gradients, printed on a slightly textured, matte background. Composition should be centered and balanced, ideal for apparel printing. Crisp edges, strong silhouettes, high detail, volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed.
